description: Detects mutex Lock() calls in Go that may not have a corresponding Unlock(). Simplified from Rust: flags all selector_expression method calls with field 'Lock', 'RLock', or 'TryLock'. Cannot verify presence of matching Unlock() in function scope or check for defer usage.

flag.message: method call detected on selector expression -- verify Lock/RLock/TryLock calls have matching deferred Unlock/RUnlock in scope
